top_signals.title: Dutch plant for combat-zone robots offers fresh supply pipeline for Ukraine
top_signals.summary: The facility has already produced its first THeMIS vehicle for the Dutch government, part of a run of more than 100 such robots pledged by the Netherlands.

top_signals.title: National Lottery operator sees ‘inflection point’ despite drop in revenue
top_signals.summary: The operator of the National Lottery has revealed lower UK sales and earnings for the start of the year but said it saw an “inflection point” on the horizon its British arm. Allwyn, the European gaming operator who took over the UK National lottery in 2024, booked revenue growth of around a fifth in the [...]

top_signals.title: Japan likely sold foreign securities to fund currency intervention
top_signals.summary: The country's foreign securities holdings dropped by $75.6 billion from April, according to Finance Ministry reserve data released Friday.

top_signals.title: A New U.S. Battery Line Designed to Make Energy Storage Safer and Cheaper
top_signals.summary: The US has recently launched a new battery production line, which is expected to help researchers develop safer and cheaper energy storage technologies for the electric grid. The new line is housed at the Grid Storage Launchpad (GSL), a 93,000-square-foot research facility. It is run by the Department of Energy's (DOE) Pacific Northwest National Laboratory (PNNL) in Richland, Washington State. According to PNNL, the newly commissioned production line features a total of 16 pieces of equipment inside a 1,400-square-foot laboratory. It is reportedly…
